question:
Rompuses are not earthy. Every rompus is a zumpus. Zumpuses are not bitter. Every zumpus is a jompus. Each jompus is dull. Jompuses are vumpuses. Numpuses are not transparent. Every vumpus is not kind. Vumpuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are temperate. Every tumpus is a yumpus. Yumpuses are happy. Yumpuses are dumpuses. Every dumpus is liquid. Dumpuses are wumpuses. Wumpuses are transparent. Wumpuses are impuses. Sam is a vumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sam is not transparent.
